# RAFIESTER - IT Project Manager & System Analyst

## About
Professional portfolio of Rafiester, an IT Project Manager and System Analyst specializing in bridging business requirements with clean, high-performance web applications using Vue.js, Nuxt.js, and modern tech stacks.

## Core Expertise
- IT Project Management & Agile/Scrum
- System Analysis & Architecture Design
- Frontend Engineering (Vue.js, Nuxt.js, CSS)
- User Interface & User Experience (UI/UX) Design

## Navigation & Sitemap
- Home / Hero Section: `/`
- Services & Capabilities: `/#services`
- Case Studies / Portfolio: `/#portfolio`
- Experience / Journey: `/#experience`
- About Me / Skills: `/#about`
- Contact / Call to Action: `https://wa.me/6281336191660`

## Technical Stack
- **Frameworks:** Vue.js 3, Vue Router, GSAP, OGL (WebGL)
- **Database / CMS:** Supabase
- **Hosting / Deployments:** Vercel
